title: Disenchantment Plus
description: A simple disenchanter mod, requires owolib, fabric api, and fabric loader 18.1 or above
body:
This is a simple disenchanter mod that uses owo lib and fabric api, adds a new block and a new item, the block is, you guessed it, the disenchantment table (disenchanter) and the item is a black book whitch is reqired to craft the disenchanter, see crafting recipes below
![The disenchanter in question](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6f99523bec66c8560143e2fc437cec0b8c2fbca.png)

The disenchanter in question

![the Gui in question](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1182ea534adc1cbf1451f70124f35954106c74e5.png)

the Gui in question

![The disenchanter crafting recipe in question](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be620d6a5aed6ec5fa7bafcf06dcbc60e3df1a54.png)

The disenchanter crafting recipe in question

![The black book crafting recipe in question (still beating a dead horse)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/337578527af4c4e06060590f2299c05314091846.png)

The black book crafting recipe in question (still beating the dead horse)
